heading: AWS Partner Solutions
body:
AWS (Amazon Web Services) Partner Solutions provide pre-built CloudFormation templates to
help you provision a group of Atlas resources for specific use cases
instead of deploying them one by one. Partner Solutions help you deploy
popular technologies to AWS (Amazon Web Services) according to AWS (Amazon Web Services) best practices.

> **See Also:** [AWS Quick Starts](https://aws.amazon.com/quickstart/?solutions-all.sort-by=item.additionalFields.sortDate\&solutions-all.sort-order=desc\&awsf.filter-content-type=*all\&awsf.filter-tech-category=*all\&awsf.filter-industry=*all\&solutions-all.q=mongodb\&solutions-all.q_operator=AND).
